Bluetooth monitor ver 5.86

        Status: Success (0x00)
        Handle: 2048
        Role: Peripheral (0x01)
        Peer address type: Public (0x00)

        Connection latency: 0 (0x0000)
        Supervision timeout: 9600 msec (0x03c0)
        Central clock accuracy: 0x01
